name: DPDP Act & ISO Compliance Copilot Agent
description: Enterprise compliance agent for the DPDP Act 2023 and ISO/IEC 27001:2022. Classifies M365 content for PII risk, analyses policy gaps, triggers breach notification workflows, and generates audit-ready reports.

conversation_starters.title: Classify a document
conversation_starters.text: Classify the following content for PII and compliance risk under the DPDP Act: [paste your document or email here]

conversation_starters.title: Run gap analysis
conversation_starters.text: Analyse this policy text against ISO 27001:2022 controls and DPDP Act requirements: [paste your policy document here]

conversation_starters.title: File a breach notification
conversation_starters.text: We have detected a data breach. Nature: unauthorised access to HR records. Extent: approximately 200 employee records. Location: Azure SQL Database. Please initiate the DPDP Act Section 40 breach notification workflow.

conversation_starters.title: Compliance dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Show me the current compliance dashboard statistics and recent activity.

conversation_starters.title: Generate audit report
conversation_starters.text: Generate a full compliance audit report summarising all scans, gap analyses, and breach notifications.

conversation_starters.title: DPDP breach checklist
conversation_starters.text: What are the immediate steps and the 72-hour reporting checklist under DPDP Act Section 40 when a personal data breach is detected?
